# Fugax

> AI-powered identity synthesis companion for OpenClaw and Soul Spec.

Fugax transforms brain dump text into structured SOUL.md identity documents for AI agents. It is a companion tool for the OpenClaw ecosystem that provides a 3-stage pipeline: entity extraction, archetypal pattern analysis, and LLM-assisted synthesis. Works with any local or remote LLM via Ollama or OpenAI-compatible APIs. Zero external Python dependencies.

## Use cases

- Generate SOUL.md personas for OpenClaw, SoulClaw, and compatible systems
- Synthesize AI agent identity from cultural references, values, and influences
- Analyze archetypal patterns (transformation, power, shadow, trickster, etc.) in text
- Check cross-language naming risks across 28+ languages
- Create portable persona files for Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT, and Gemini
- Preserve creative reasoning with trace logging and backups

## Ecosystem

- [OpenClaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw): Open-source AI assistant that reads SOUL.md natively
- [Soul Spec](https://github.com/clawsouls/soulspec): Open standard for AI agent personas (v0.5)
- [SoulClaw](https://github.com/clawsouls/soulclaw): Soul-driven AI agent framework built on OpenClaw
- [ClawSouls Registry](https://github.com/clawsouls/registry): Open registry for AI agent personas

## Key paths

- [README.md](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Fugax/blob/main/README.md): Public-facing overview with FAQ and compatibility table
- [fugax/](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Fugax/tree/main/fugax/): Core Python package
- [tests/](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Fugax/tree/main/tests/): Verification suite (80 tests, unittest)
- [app.py](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Fugax/blob/main/app.py): HTTP server entry point (stdlib, port 3110)
- [Dockerfile](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Fugax/blob/main/Dockerfile): Multi-stage production build
- [traefik/](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Fugax/tree/main/traefik/): Reverse-proxy deployment examples

## Optional

- [docker-compose.yml](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Fugax/blob/main/docker-compose.yml): Production Docker Compose config
- [.env.example](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Fugax/blob/main/.env.example): Environment variable template
- [.github/workflows/ci.yml](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Fugax/blob/main/.github/workflows/ci.yml): CI/CD pipeline with Blacksmith runners
- [fugax/templates/landing.html](https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Fugax/blob/main/fugax/templates/landing.html): Interactive UI with SSE streaming demo

## Keywords

SOUL.md generator, AI persona synthesis, OpenClaw companion, Soul Spec tool, AI agent identity, entity extraction, pattern analysis, LLM synthesis, persona document generator, AI identity builder, archetypal pattern analysis, cross-language translation check.
